task:
Add vim text objects with operators to app.cljs. Multi-key sequence: operator → i/a → object.

STATE: Add 3 atoms next to pending-motion:
- pending-operator: nil, :c (change), :d (delete)
- pending-object-type: nil, :inner, :a
- pending-object: nil, keyword for the object type

FLOW:
1. Press 'c' in NORMAL mode → set pending-operator :c
2. Press 'd' → set pending-operator :d (separate from dd — dd uses double-tap, single d sets operator mode)
3. After operator is set, press 'i' → set pending-object-type :inner
4. Or press 'a' → set pending-object-type :a
5. After object-type is set, press object key (w, W, ", ', (, [, {, <) → compute text range → execute operator

IMPLEMENT for these objects:
- w (word): inner=current word, a=word+trailing space
- " (double quote): find surrounding "..." 
- ' (single quote): find surrounding '...'
- ( or ): find surrounding (...)
- [ or ]: find surrounding [...]
- { or }: find surrounding {...}
- < or >: find surrounding <...>

Text range functions take text and cursor-pos, return [start end]:
- word-range: skip word chars to find boundaries
- quote-range: search backward/forward for matching quote char
- bracket-range: search for matching bracket pairs

Execute operator:
- :d (delete): set-text! to remove the range, move cursor-pos to start
- :c (change): same as d then set-mode! :insert

IMPORTANT: 'd' for delete-operator conflicts with 'dd'. Fix: single 'd' sets operator, but if last-key was 'd' within 800ms (dd already handles this), let dd fire first. Use a check: if last-key is 'd' and recent, skip setting operator.

Add handler BEFORE the Normal mode cond — when pending-operator is set, intercept i/a/object keys.

Use replace_in_file. Export and task_complete when done.

;; ──────────────────────────────────────────────
;; Vimflowy — Tree Outliner with Vim Keybindings
;; ──────────────────────────────────────────────

;; ── Utils ──
(defn gen-id [] (str "n" (random-uuid)))

;; ── Global State ──
(defonce app (atom nil))

(defn nodes [] (:nodes @app))
(defn focused [] (:focused @app))
(defn mode [] (:mode @app))
(defn help? [] (:help @app))

;; ── Persistence ──
(def storage-key "vimflowy-data-v2")

(defn save-local []
  (try
    (.setItem js/localStorage storage-key (js/JSON.stringify (clj->js @app)))
    (catch js/Error _ nil)))

(defn load-local []
  (try
    (let [raw (.getItem js/localStorage storage-key)]
      (when raw
        (let [parsed (js->clj (js/JSON.parse raw) :keywordize-keys true)]
          (reset! app (merge parsed {:cursor-pos 0 :help false})))
        true))
    (catch js/Error _ false)))

;; ── Tree Operations ──

;; ── Text Object Range Functions ──

(defn word-range-inner [text pos]
  (let [len (count text)]
    (when (and (>= pos 0) (< pos len) (not (word-delim? (str (aget text pos)))))
      (let [start (loop [i pos]
                    (if (or (<= i 0) (word-delim? (str (aget text (dec i)))))
                      i
                      (recur (dec i))))
            end (loop [i pos]
                  (if (or (>= i (dec len)) (word-delim? (str (aget text (inc i)))))
                    (inc i)
                    (recur (inc i))))]
        [start end]))))

(defn word-range-a [text pos]
  (when-let [[start end] (word-range-inner text pos)]
    (let [len (count text)
          end2 (loop [i end]
                 (if (and (< i len) (word-delim? (str (aget text i))))
                   (recur (inc i))
                   i))]
      [start end2])))

(defn quote-range-inner [text pos qch]
  (let [len (count text)]
    (when (and (>= pos 0) (< pos len))
      (let [open-pos (loop [i (dec pos)]
                       (if (< i 0) nil
                         (if (= (str (aget text i)) qch) i (recur (dec i)))))
            close-pos (when open-pos
                        (loop [i (inc pos)]
                          (if (>= i len) nil
                            (if (= (str (aget text i)) qch) i (recur (inc i))))))]
        (when (and open-pos close-pos)
          [(inc open-pos) close-pos])))))

(defn quote-range-a [text pos qch]
  (let [len (count text)]
    (when (and (>= pos 0) (< pos len))
      (let [open-pos (loop [i (dec pos)]
                       (if (< i 0) nil
                         (if (= (str (aget text i)) qch) i (recur (dec i)))))
            close-pos (when open-pos
                        (loop [i (inc pos)]
                          (if (>= i len) nil
                            (if (= (str (aget text i)) qch) i (recur (inc i))))))]
        (when (and open-pos close-pos)
          [open-pos (inc close-pos)])))))

(defn bracket-range-inner [text pos open-ch close-ch]
  (let [len (count text)]
    (when (and (>= pos 0) (< pos len))
      (let [open-pos (loop [i (dec pos) depth 1]
                       (if (< i 0) nil
                         (let [ch (str (aget text i))]
                           (cond
                             (= ch close-ch) (recur (dec i) (inc depth))
                             (= ch open-ch)  (if (= depth 1) i (recur (dec i) (dec depth)))
                             :else            (recur (dec i) depth)))))
            close-pos (when open-pos
                        (loop [i (inc pos) depth 1]
                          (if (>= i len) nil
                            (let [ch (str (aget text i))]
                              (cond
                                (= ch open-ch)  (recur (inc i) (inc depth))
                                (= ch close-ch) (if (= depth 1) i (recur (inc i) (dec depth)))
                                :else            (recur (inc i) depth))))))]
        (when (and open-pos close-pos)
          [(inc open-pos) close-pos])))))

(defn bracket-range-a [text pos open-ch close-ch]
  (let [len (count text)]
    (when (and (>= pos 0) (< pos len))
      (let [open-pos (loop [i (dec pos) depth 1]
                       (if (< i 0) nil
                         (let [ch (str (aget text i))]
                           (cond
                             (= ch close-ch) (recur (dec i) (inc depth))
                             (= ch open-ch)  (if (= depth 1) i (recur (dec i) (dec depth)))
                             :else            (recur (dec i) depth)))))
            close-pos (when open-pos
                        (loop [i (inc pos) depth 1]
                          (if (>= i len) nil
                            (let [ch (str (aget text i))]
                              (cond
                                (= ch open-ch)  (recur (inc i) (inc depth))
                                (= ch close-ch) (if (= depth 1) i (recur (inc i) (dec depth)))
                                :else            (recur (inc i) depth))))))]
        (when (and open-pos close-pos)
          [open-pos (inc close-pos)])))))

(defn get-object-range [text pos obj-key obj-type]
  (let [inner? (= obj-type :inner)]
    (case obj-key
      "w" (if inner? (word-range-inner text pos) (word-range-a text pos))
      ("\"" "'") (if inner? (quote-range-inner text pos obj-key) (quote-range-a text pos obj-key))
      ("(" ")") (if inner? (bracket-range-inner text pos "(" ")") (bracket-range-a text pos "(" ")"))
      ("[" "]") (if inner? (bracket-range-inner text pos "[" "]") (bracket-range-a text pos "[" "]"))
      ("{" "}") (if inner? (bracket-range-inner text pos "{" "}") (bracket-range-a text pos "{" "}"))
      ("<" ">") (if inner? (bracket-range-inner text pos "<" ">") (bracket-range-a text pos "<" ">"))
      nil)))

;; ── Utils ──
(defn gen-id [] (str "n" (random-uuid)))

;; ── Global State ──
(defonce app (atom nil))

(defn nodes [] (:nodes @app))
(defn focused [] (:focused @app))
(defn mode [] (:mode @app))
(defn help? [] (:help @app))

;; ── Persistence ──
(def storage-key "vimflowy-data-v2")

(defn save-local []
  (try
    (.setItem js/localStorage storage-key (js/JSON.stringify (clj->js @app)))
    (catch js/Error _ nil)))

(defn load-local []
  (try
    (let [raw (.getItem js/localStorage storage-key)]
      (when raw
        (let [parsed (js->clj (js/JSON.parse raw) :keywordize-keys true)]
          (reset! app (merge parsed {:cursor-pos 0 :help false})))
        true))
    (catch js/Error _ false)))

;; ── Tree Operations ──
(defn node-at [id] (get (nodes) id))
(defn parent-of [id] (:parent (node-at id)))
(defn children-of [id] (:children (node-at id)))
(defn depth [id]
  (loop [n id d 0]
    (let [p (parent-of n)]
      (if (or (nil? p) (= p "root")) d (recur p (inc d))))))

(defn flat-visible []
  (let [nds (nodes)]
    (loop [stack (list (get nds "root"))
           result []]
      (if (empty? stack)
        result
        (let [node (first stack)
              remaining (rest stack)]
          (if (:collapsed node)
            (recur remaining (conj result (:id node)))
            (recur (into (mapv (fn [id] (get nds id)) (reverse (:children node))) remaining)
                   (conj result (:id node)))))))))

(defn index-of [id]
  (let [vs (flat-visible)]
    (first (keep-indexed (fn [i v] (when (= v id) i)) vs))))

(defn node-at-index [idx]
  (let [vs (flat-visible)]
    (when (and (>= idx 0) (< idx (count vs)))
      (nth vs idx))))

(defn sibling-index [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id)]
    (when p
      (let [sibs (children-of p)]
        (first (keep-indexed (fn [i s] (when (= s id) i)) sibs))))))

(defn prev-sibling [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id) sibs (children-of p) si (sibling-index id)]
    (when (and si (> si 0)) (nth sibs (dec si)))))

(defn next-sibling [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id) sibs (children-of p) si (sibling-index id)]
    (when (and si (< si (dec (count sibs)))) (nth sibs (inc si)))))

;; ── Mutations ──
(defn update-node! [id f & args]
  (swap! app (fn [st]
               (let [nd (get-in st [:nodes id])]
                 (if nd
                   (assoc-in st [:nodes id] (apply f nd args))
                   st)))))

(defn set-text! [id text]
  (update-node! id assoc :text text))

(defn set-collapsed! [id v]
  (update-node! id assoc :collapsed v))

(defn toggle-collapsed! [id]
  (update-node! id update :collapsed not))

(defn toggle-completed! [id]
  (update-node! id update :completed not))

(defn focus! [id]
  (swap! app assoc :focused id :cursor-pos 0))

(defn set-mode! [m]
  (swap! app assoc :mode m))

(defn toggle-help! []
  (swap! app update :help not))

(defn add-child! [parent-id]
  (let [nid (gen-id)]

    (focus! nid)
    nid))

(prn "word-range-inner 'hello world' pos=2:" (word-range-inner "hello world" 2))
(prn "word-range-a 'hello world' pos=2:" (word-range-a "hello world" 2))

(prn "=== quotes ===")
(prn "quote-range-inner 'say \"hi\" now' pos=5:" (quote-range-inner "say \"hi\" now" 5 "\""))
(prn "quote-range-a 'say \"hi\" now' pos=5:" (quote-range-a "say \"hi\" now" 5 "\""))
(prn "quote-range-inner \"it's a test\" pos=3:" (quote-range-inner "it's a test" 3 "'"))
(prn "quote-range-a \"it's a test\" pos=3:" (quote-range-a "it's a test" 3 "'"))

(prn "=== brackets ===")
(prn "bracket-range-inner '(a (b) c)' pos=3:" (bracket-range-inner "(a (b) c)" 3 "(" ")"))
(prn "bracket-range-a '(a (b) c)' pos=3:" (bracket-range-a "(a (b) c)" 3 "(" ")"))
(prn "bracket-range-inner '[x y]' pos=1:" (bracket-range-inner "[x y]" 1 "[" "]"))
(prn "bracket-range-a '[x y]' pos=1:" (bracket-range-a "[x y]" 1 "[" "]"))

(prn "=== get-object-range ===")
(prn "w inner:" (get-object-range "hello world" 0 "w" :inner))
(prn "w a:" (get-object-range "hello world" 0 "w" :a))
(prn "\" inner:" (get-object-range "say \"hi\" there" 5 "\"" :inner))
(prn "\" a:" (get-object-range "say \"hi\" there" 5 "\"" :a))
(prn "( inner:" (get-object-range "(abc)" 1 "(" :inner))
(prn "( a:" (get-object-range "(abc)" 1 "(" :a))
